TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ti-jau ta na ngara ka d'llig ki karoummættæh,ka tama-talum ta Rama-au.
Tijau ta na ngara ka d'llig ki karoummættæh,ka tamatalum ta Ramaau.
S.TRANSL: Ick ben de ware wijnstock ende mijn Dader is De lantman.
I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman.
＂我是真葡萄樹，我父是栽培的人。

S.FORM: Ymmidki pehil ka i-tou-koua jau-an assi makka-voua, ha-mi'intynta anna, ka ymmid ka makka-voua, pa ka-kouptig-hen tyn, alei ka makka-saoun-a' makka-voua.
Ymmidki pehil ka itoukoua jauan assi makkavoua, hami'intynta anna, ka ymmid ka makkavoua, pa kakouptighen tyn, alei ka makkasaouna' makkavoua.
S.TRANSL: Alle rancke die in my geen brucht en draeght Die neemt hy werch ende alle die brucht draeght Die reynight hy op Dat sy meer brucht Drage.
Every branch in me that beareth not fruit he taketh away: and every branch that beareth fruit, he purgeth it, that it may bring forth more fruit.
凡屬我不結果子的枝子，他就剪去；凡結果子的，他就修理乾淨，使枝子結果子更多。

S.FORM: Makou-ptigh-kamou hnyn ta ymoumi, alei ki sou, ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn.
Makouptighkamou hnyn ta ymoumi, alei ki sou, ka nipasousouennau ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Ghy-lieden zijt ny reyn om Het woort dat ick tot u gesproken hebbe.
Now ye are clean through the word which I have spoken unto you.
現在你們因我講給你們的道，已經乾淨了。

S.FORM: Mæylli-ijau-an, ti jau-appa ymoumi-æn-da. Mama ka assi makka-lpough makka-voua syk-kounnoung ta pehil, rou assi m-ylli ki na-ngara ki karæumætth: komm'-appa-kamou ta ymoumi assi makka-lpough, rou assi-ka-mou mæylli jau-an.

Mæylliijauan, ti jauappa ymoumiænda. Mama ka assi makkalpough makkavoua sykkounnoung ta pehil, rou assi mylli ki nangara ki karæumætth: komm'appakamou ta ymoumi assi makkalpough, rou assikamou mæylli jauan.
S.TRANSL: Blijbet in my ende ick in u. Ghelijckerwijs De ranclie geen bruct en kan Dragen ban haer selben soo sy niet in den wijnstock en blijft: alsoo oock ghy niet soo ghy in my niet en blijbet.
Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me.
你們要常在我裏面，我也常在你們裏面。枝子若不常在葡萄樹上，自己就不能結果子；你們若不常在我裏面，也是這樣。

S.FORM: Ti jau ta na ngara ki karæu-mættæh, ymoumi-ra ta-pehil: ti mamang ta mæylli jau-an, ti jau appa tyni-æn, teni ta makka ta-pang makka-voua: alei ka dou ä'ou-si-koh assi-kamou pa-yl-pough pamut ki mamang.
Ti jau ta na ngara ki karæumættæh, ymoumira tapehil: ti mamang ta mæylli jauan, ti jau appa tyniæn, teni ta makka tapang makkavoua: alei ka dou ä'ousikoh assikamou paylpough pamut ki mamang.
S.TRANSL: Ick Ick ben De wijnstock(ende) ghy De rancken : Die in my blijft ende ick in hem Die braeght beel brucht : want sonder my en kondt ghy niets doen.
I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing.
我是葡萄樹，你們是枝子。常在我裏面的，我也常在他裏面，這人就多結果子；因為離了我，你們就不能做甚麼。

S.FORM: Ti mamang ta assi mæ-ylli jau-an, s'aki-tauwagh-en mama ki pehil ka mi-laklak-ato: ka pali-lid-din smaki-koua tou apoei pa-yllamæh.
Ti mamang ta assi mæylli jauan, s'akitauwaghen mama ki pehil ka milaklakato: ka paliliddin smakikoua tou apoei payllamæh.
S.TRANSL: Soo yemandt in my niet en bljft Die is buyten geworpen ghelhijckerwijs De rancke ende is berdozret: enDe men bergadert De selbe enBe Men werpt se in Het byer ende sy worden berbrandt.
If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast them into the fire, and they are burned.
人若不常在我裏面，就像枝子丟在外面枯乾，人拾起來，扔在火裏燒了。

S.FORM: Heirou mæylli-kamou jau-an, ka rou mæylli ymoumiæn ta sou-au, ka mamang ka kamoei-ei-moumi, t'oumimi-a-auto, ka paamt-teih ymoumi-æn.
Heirou mæyllikamou jauan, ka rou mæylli ymoumiæn ta souau, ka mamang ka kamoeieimoumi, t'oumimiaauto, ka paamtteih ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Indien ghy in my blijbet ende mijne woorden in u blijben soo wat ghy wilt sult ghy begeeren ende het sal u geschieden.
If ye abide in me, and my words abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done unto you.
你們若常在我裏面，我的話也常在你們裏面，凡你們所願意的，祈求，就給你們成就。

S.FORM: Tou atta pou-vavau-en-ato ki kidi ta Raman-au, ka makka-tapang-kamou makka-voua: ka Pahtatæu-tæu-ug-ei-mau-ka-mou.
Tou atta pouvavauenato ki kidi ta Ramanau, ka makkatapangkamou makkavoua: ka Pahtatæutæuugeimaukamou.
S.TRANSL: . Hier in is mijn Dader berheerlickt Dat ghy beel brucht Draeght: ende ghy sultmijne Discipulen zijn.
Herein is my Father glorified, that ye bear much fruit; so shall ye be my disciples.
你們多結果子，我父就因此得榮耀，你們也就是我的門徒了。

S.FORM: Mama ki ni-kavæ'ango-en-koh ki Rama, ni-mavæ'angö-app-'oh ymoumi-æn: mæylli-â tou ka-væ'angö-en-nau katta.
Mama ki nikavæ'angoenkoh ki Rama, nimavæ'angöapp'oh ymoumiæn: mæylliâ tou kavæ'angöennau katta.
S.TRANSL: Gelijckerwijs De Dader My lief gehadt heeft hebbe ick oock u lief gehadt : blijft in dese mijne liefde.
As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.
我愛你們，正如父愛我一樣；你們要常在我的愛裏。

S.FORM: Heirou hmaä-kamou ki-pahkou-sou-en-nau; maylli-ah-ka-mou tou væ'angö-au: mama ki ni-haä-au ta pahkou-sasou-ki Raman-au, ka maylli-koh tou væ'an-gö tyn.
Heirou hmaäkamou kipahkousouennau; maylliahkamou tou væ'angöau: mama ki nihaäau ta pahkousasouki Ramanau, ka mayllikoh tou væ'angö tyn.
S.TRANSL: . Indien ghy mijne geboden bewaert soo sult ghy in mijne liefde blijben ghelicjckerwijs ick De geboden mijns Daders bewaer hebbe ende blijbe Ã­n sijne liefde.
If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.
你們若遵守我的命令，就常在我的愛裏，正如我遵守了我父的命令，常在他的愛裏。

S.FORM: Ka mamang katta ta ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ymoumi-æn, alei ka maylli-ah ymoumi-æn ta kari-en-nau, ka pavaut-aul-appa ta karæi-noumi.
Ka mamang katta ta nipasousouennau ymoumiæn, alei ka maylliah ymoumiæn ta kariennau, ka pavautaulappa ta karæinoumi.
S.TRANSL: Dese Dinghen hebbe ickick tot u gesproken op Dat mijne bljdtschap in u bijbe ende uwe blijdt schap bertult werde.
These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full.
＂這些事我已經對你們說了，是要叫我的喜樂存在你們心裏，並叫你們的喜樂可以滿足。

S.FORM: Atta ta pah kou-sou-en-nau, ka makka-nanado-a-kamou makka-vavæ'angs, mama ka ni-kavæ'ango ymoumi-æn.
Atta ta pah kousouennau, ka makkananadoakamou makkavavæ'angs, mama ka nikavæ'ango ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Dit is mijn ghebodt Dat ghy malkanderen lief hebt gelijckerwijs ick u lief gehadt hebbe.
This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you.
你們要彼此相愛，像我愛你們一樣；這就是我的命令。

S.FORM: A'ou-i ta ti mamang ki kavæ'angs-en ka si-ourou irang dyk ki atta, ka pou-koua-an tyn ta kæuag-han tyn alei ki rieoutyn.
A'oui ta ti mamang ki kavæ'angsen ka siourou irang dyk ki atta, ka poukouaan tyn ta kæuaghan tyn alei ki rieoutyn.
S.TRANSL: Niemandt en heeft meerder liefde als dese Dat yemandt sijn leben sette boor sijne brienden.
Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.
人為朋友捨命，人的愛心沒有比這個大的。

S.FORM: Rieou-a-mau-kamou ta ymoumi, ro pam't noumi ta pah-kou-sou-en-nau ymoumi-æn.
Rieouamaukamou ta ymoumi, ro pam't noumi ta pahkousouennau ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Ghy zijt mijne brienden soo ghy Doet wat ick u gebiede.
Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you.
你們若遵行我所吩咐的，就是我的朋友了。

S.FORM: Assi-koh koungcia ni-k'ma ymoumi-æn: ka assi mava-na ta koungcia ki poungas ki Meirang tyn: rieou-au ni-koua-au-kamotu-ra, alei ka ka mamang ka ni-'illing'h-hau ti Rama-an, ni-pa-'ou-mhga-koh ymoumi-æn.
Assikoh koungcia nik'ma ymoumiæn: ka assi mavana ta koungcia ki poungas ki Meirang tyn: rieouau nikouaaukamotura, alei ka ka mamang ka ni'illing'hhau ti Ramaan, nipa'oumhgakoh ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Ick en heete u niet meer Dienstknechten : want De Dienstknecht en weet niet wat sijn Heere Doet : maer ick hebbe u brienden genoemt want al wat ick ban mijnen Dader gehoort hebbe (dat) hebbe ick u bekendt ghemaeckt.
Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you.
以後我不再稱你們為僕人，因僕人不知道主人所做的事。我乃稱你們為朋友；因我從我父所聽見的，已經都告訴你們了。

S.FORM: Assi-kamou ni-peri jau-an,ra ti jau ta ni-peri ymoumi-æn, ka ni-si-kidi -en-nau-kamou ka-'ou-koua-ei-moumi makka-voua, ka maylli-al-appa ta voua-oumi: alei karouka mamangka t'oumi-mia-ei-moumi ti Rama-an tou Nanang-au, ka pi'æ-ah ( kianna ) ymoumi-æn.

Assikamou niperi jauan,ra ti jau ta niperi ymoumiæn, ka nisikidi ennaukamou ka'oukouaeimoumi makkavoua, ka mayllialappa ta vouaoumi: alei karouka mamangka t'oumimiaeimoumi ti Ramaan tou Nanangau, ka pi'æah ( kianna ) ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Ghy en hebt my niet uytberkoren maer ick hebbe u uytberkoren ende ick hebbe u gestelt dat ghy soudt henen gaen ende brucht dragen ende (dat) uwe brucht blijbe : op Dat soo wat ghy ban Den Wader begeeren sult in mijnen Name hy u (dat) gebe.

Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of the Father in my name, he may give it you.
不是你們揀選了我，是我揀選了你們，並且分派你們去結果子，叫你們的果子常存，使你們奉我的名，無論向父求甚麼，他就賜給你們。

S.FORM: Atta ta pahkou-sou-en-nau-kamou, alei ka makka-nana-do-ah-kamou makka-vavæ'ango
Atta ta pahkousouennaukamou, alei ka makkananadoahkamou makkavavæ'ango
S.TRANSL: Dit gebiede ick u op Dat dat ghy malkanderen lief hebt.
These things I command you, that ye love one another.
我這樣吩咐你們，是要叫你們彼此相愛。＂

S.FORM: Heirou mavahier ymou-'mi-æn ta næi, mou-mhga-â ka ni-mavahier-ato jau-an si-ouro y-moumi-æn.
Heirou mavahier ymou'miæn ta næi, moumhgaâ ka nimavahierato jauan siouro ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Indien u De wereldt haet soo meet Dat sy mt eer Dan u gehaet Heeft.
If the world hate you, ye know that it hated me before it hated you.
＂世人若恨你們，你們知道，恨你們以先已經恨我了。

S.FORM: Heirou makka næi-ka-mou-lava, ynna kavæ'angö-eih ki næi ta â teni: Râ alei ka assi-ka-mou makka næi-ato, ni-peri-appa-mau-kamou tou næi, alei ki anna mavahier ta næi ymoumi-æn.
Heirou makka næikamoulava, ynna kavæ'angöeih ki næi ta â teni: Râ alei ka assikamou makka næiato, niperiappamaukamou tou næi, alei ki anna mavahier ta næi ymoumiæn.
S.TRANSL: Indien ghy ban de wereldt waert soo soude De werelt het hare lief hebben : Doch om dat ghy ban De wereldt niet en zijt Maer ick u uyt de wereldt Hebbe uytberkoren daerom haet u de wereldt.
If ye were of the world, the world would love his own: but because ye are not of the world, but I have chosen you out of the world, therefore the world hateth you.
你們若屬世界，世界必愛屬自己的；只因你們不屬世界，乃是我從世界中揀選了你們，所以世界就恨你們。

S.FORM: Mi-balei-a ki na sou-au ymoumi-æn, Assi masaoun tou vavauki kidi ta koungcia ki Meirang tyn. Hei-rou ni-kmou-d'yl-lough ta neni jau-an, kmou-dyl-lough-âl-appa ymoumi-æn: hei-rou nihmaä ta neni ki sou-au, hmaä-âl-appa (ki fou) 'oumi.

Mibaleia ki na souau ymoumiæn, Assi masaoun tou vavauki kidi ta koungcia ki Meirang tyn. Heirou nikmoud'yllough ta neni jauan, kmoudylloughâlappa ymoumiæn: heirou nihmaä ta neni ki souau, hmaäâlappa (ki fou) 'oumi.
S.TRANSL: Gedenckt des woorts dat ick u geseoght hebbe Een dienstknecht en is niet meerDer dan sijn Heere. Indien sy my berbolght hebben sy zullen oock u berbolgen : indien sy mijn woordt bewaert hebben sy sullen oock het uwe bewaren.
Remember the word that I said unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord. If they have persecuted me, they will also persecute you; if they have kept my saying, they will keep yours also.
你們要記念我從前對你們所說的話：＂僕人不能大於主人。＂他們若逼迫了我，也要逼迫你們；若遵守了我的話，也要遵守你們的話。

S.FORM: Ra pam't-auh nein ym-mud ki mamang katta ymoumi-æn alei ki Nanang-au, alei ka assi nein k'alang-in ta teni ka ni-ma-dingi jau-an.
Ra pam'tauh nein ymmud ki mamang katta ymoumiæn alei ki Nanangau, alei ka assi nein k'alangin ta teni ka nimadingi jauan.
S.TRANSL: Maer alle dese dingen sullen sy u Doen om mijns Naems wille om Dat sy hem niet en kennen Die my gesonden heeft.
But all these things will they do unto you for my name's sake, because they know not him that sent me.
但他們因我的名要向你們行這一切的事，因為他們不認識那差我來的。

S.FORM: Hei-rou ni-ynna-koh ier-roua masousou neini-æn, ynna ä'ou-si ki varau ta neni: râ hnin äoulough ta neni ki tagpag-eih ta varau nein.
Heirou niynnakoh ierroua masousou neiniæn, ynna ä'ousi ki varau ta neni: râ hnin äoulough ta neni ki tagpageih ta varau nein.
S.TRANSL: Indien ick niet gekomen en Ware ende tot haer gesproken en hadde sy en hadDen geen sonde : maer nu en Hebben sy geen boorwendsel boor Hare sonde.
If I had not come and spoken unto them, they had not had sin: but now they have no cloak for their sin.
我若沒有來教訓他們，他們就沒有罪；但如今他們的罪無可推諉了。

S.FORM: Ti-mamang ta mavahier jau-an, mavahier-appa ki Rara-man-au.
Timamang ta mavahier jauan, mavahierappa ki Raramanau.
S.TRANSL: Die my haet Die haet oock mijnen dader.
He that hateth me hateth my Father also.
恨我的，也恨我的父。

S.FORM: Heirou ni-ynna-koh pa-mut ki na ryngei neini-an, ka assi ni-pam't-tin timamang ka pani, ynna ka ä'ou-si ta varau neini-æn : râ hynyn ni-k'ytt-'an nein (ta an-na), ka ni-mavahier jau-anti Ta-raman-appa-mau-ra.
Heirou niynnakoh pamut ki na ryngei neinian, ka assi nipam'ttin timamang ka pani, ynna ka ä'ousi ta varau neiniæn : râ hynyn nik'ytt'an nein (ta anna), ka nimavahier jauanti Taramanappamaura.
S.TRANSL: InIndien ick De Wercken onder Haer niet en hadde gedaen dieniemandt anders gedaen en heeft sy en hadden geen sonde : maer nu hebben syse gesien ende bey de my ende mijnen Dader gehaet.
If I had not done among them the works which none other man did, they had not had sin: but now have they both seen and hated both me and my Father.
我若沒有在他們中間行過別人未曾行的事，他們就沒有罪；但如今連我與我的父，他們也看見也恨惡了。

S.FORM: Alei ka pavæut-auh ta sou ka na sas'oulat tou Tatouhko nein, Ni-mavahier ta neni jau-an touä'ou-si ki alei.
Alei ka pavæutauh ta sou ka na sas'oulat tou Tatouhko nein, Nimavahier ta neni jauan touä'ousi ki alei.
S.TRANSL: Maer (dit geschiet) op Dat het woordt berbult worde Dat in Hare Wet gescheben is Sy hebben my sonder oorsaoke gehaet.
But this cometh to pass, that the word might be fulfilled that is written in their law, They hated me without a cause.
這要應驗他們律法上所寫的話，說：＂他們無故地恨我。＂

S.FORM: Irou-ra ierrou-âl-ato ta Tama-Paka-haniap, ka padingi-ei-mau-makou ti Rama-an, ta Joep-pan ki katiktik-an ki sou, ka pa-'ou-kou'-a-n ki Rama, teni ta gmail-ah jau-an.
Iroura ierrouâlato ta TamaPakahaniap, ka padingieimaumakou ti Ramaan, ta Joeppan ki katiktikan ki sou, ka pa'oukou'an ki Rama, teni ta gmailah jauan.
S.TRANSL: Maer wanneer de Trooster sal gekomen zijn dien ick u senden sal Ban Den Dader (namelick) De Geest. der waerheydt Die ban den Dader uytgaet de sal ban. my getuygen.
But when the Comforter is come, whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of truth, which proceedeth from the Father, he shall testify of me:
但我要從父那裏差保惠師來，就是從父出來真理的聖靈；他來了，就要為我作見證。

S.FORM: Ka gmail-al-appa-kamou ta ymoumi, alei ka ni-toulan-ka-mou jau-an tou naunamou.
Ka gmailalappakamou ta ymoumi, alei ka nitoulankamou jauan tou naunamou.
S.TRANSL: . Ende ghy sult oock getuygen Want ghy zijt ban Den beginne Met my gheweest.
And ye also shall bear witness, because ye have been with me from the beginning.
你們也要作見證，因為你們從起頭就與我同在。＂
